en: I felt like I was in the zone and I couldn't make a mistake. It was just this thing that took over, you know?

en: So I would say that whole day, 12 hours of shooting.
ko: 그래서 그날 하루 종일, 12시간 촬영했다고 할 수 있어.

en: They've been captivated by what you're doing. And I understood because I felt in a zone where I could just own the character and be the character.
ko: 그들이 네가 하는 것에 매료됐어. 나도 그 캐릭터를 완전히 소화할 수 있는 기분이었어.
그게 아마 내가 가장 좋아하는 기억이야.
